items.title: Why C3.ai Plunged in August
items.author: Billy Duberstein
items.description: C3.ai experienced a challenging quarter with a 28.2% stock decline in August, missing revenue guidance by 30%. The company appointed a new CEO, Stephen Ehikian, after former CEO Thomas Siebel stepped down, and revamped its sales organization.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Missed quarterly revenue guidance by 30%, significant stock price decline, leadership transition, and continued operating losses despite strong cash position
Mentioned in context of new CEO's background, no direct performance discussion

items.title: Salesforce (CRM) Declares US$0.42 Per Share Quarterly Dividend
items.description: Salesforce (CRM) recently reaffirmed its commitment to shareholder value with a quarterly dividend and continued to build investor confidence through robust Q2 earnings results, showing impressive revenue and net income growth. The dividend announcement, coupled with a $20 billion increase in buyback authorization, reflects the company's strategic focus on rewarding shareholders. Despite these positive moves, Salesforce's stock remained largely flat over the past month, in line with broader...

items.title: Salesforce, Inc. (CRM) Is Getting Killed By AI, Says JIm Cramer
